item.title: AI Tools for Indigenous Languages
item.description: An NSERC Discovery Grant funded project developing multimodal AI tools for underrepresented languages, with a focus on the Matsigenka language of Peru and Inuktitut in northern Canada. The project follows OCAP and TCPS 2 data sovereignty principles and involves community partners including Tejiendo Puentes en Salud, Ayni Desarrollo, Heritage Lab, and CECONAMA. Conducted through Polytechnique Montréal in collaboration with MILA.

item.title: BigDocs
item.description: BigDocs is a large scale, open, and permissively licensed dataset for training multimodal models on document understanding and code generation tasks. Published at ICLR 2025.
